zh.Cheadle, Staffordshire, England: 英國斯塔福爾黑阿德爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Beke於1336年9月15日出生在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾布洛爾 雷時，她的父親Thomas Beke27歲，母親Alice of Blore Heath19歲。她於1365年與Ralph Basset在英國斯塔福爾黑阿德爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1408年9月20日在英國英格蘭享年72歲。

nameMeanings.name: Beke
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Flemish and Dutch: variant of   Beek  .
Hungarian (also Béke): most probably from a Hungarian form of the Turkish status name beg (see Beg ). Alternatively, it may be a pet form of a Hungarian personal name such as Benedek .

variants.name: Beek
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Ernst, Johannes, Kurt, Otto.

Dutch and North German: topographic name for someone who lived by a stream or creek, beek (compare Bek 6), or a habitational name from any of various Dutch places called Beek (in Limburg, Gelderland, and North Brabant), named with the same word.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Beke was born on 15 September 1336, in Blore Ray, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Thomas Beke, was 27 and her mother, Alice of Blore Heath, was 19. She married Ralph Basset in 1365, in Cheadle, Staffordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 20 September 1408, in England, United Kingdom, at the age of 72.

Elle a épousé Ralph Basset en 1365, à Cheadle, Staffordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 20 septembre 1408, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 72 ans.

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Beke(이)가 1336년 9월 15일 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 블로어 라이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Beke(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice of Blore Heath(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 1365년 영국 스태퍼드실르 체아들일에서 Ralph Basset(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1408년 9월 20일 영국 잉글랜드에서 72세의 나이로 사망했다.
